hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
dangerous = [
    (r'rm\s+(-\S*r\S*f\S*|-\S*f\S*r\S*|--recursive\s+--force|--force\s+--recursive)', 'rm -rf: recursive force delete'),
    (r'\bDROP\s+TABLE\b', 'DROP TABLE: destructive SQL'),
    (r'git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)(\s|$)', 'git push --force: overwrites remote history'),
]
for pattern, label in dangerous:
    if re.search(pattern, cmd, re.IGNORECASE):
        print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': f'Blocked dangerous command [{label}]: {cmd[:120]}'}))
        sys.exit(1)
"

ruff check . && mypy ex_pipeline.py test_pipeline.py && python -m pytest -q; EC=$?; if [ $EC -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Pre-commit checks failed. Fix ruff/mypy/pytest errors before committing."}'; exit 1; fi
